firing_structure.k_necessity_rationale: K-track premise REFUTED on toxicity: the general latent g fires on 66% of toxic comments and its per-sub-context recall holes are small [threat] hole=0.57 detector-covers-g-holes=0.74 firing-Jaccard(g,det)=0.403 => not absorption-like [identity_attack] hole=0.52 detector-covers-g-holes=0.93 firing-Jaccard(g,det)=0.292 => not absorption-like Label-Jaccard insult-obscene=0.245 (shared-support) vs SAE-firing-Jaccard(obscene-detector,insult-detector)=0.655; threat/identity_attack labels are <0.05-disjoint. SAE firing structure DEPARTS from the label co-occurrence structure.

1041.label: technical terms and concepts related to programming or data structures

1920.label: references to specific biological terms and acronyms

2620.label: words associated with authority, control, and criticism of governance

6810.label: terms related to software licensing and legal disclaimers

7507.label: numerical data and references related to statistics and measurements

11573.label: terms and phrases related to race, identity, and social justice

11630.label: specific elements or actions associated with conflict and violence

13367.label: phrases and terms that convey skepticism or criticism towards mainstream narratives, especially those related to marginalized groups and societal structures

14630.label: character names and terms in various languages, particularly those with diacritics

detector_label_per_sub.threat: specific elements or actions associated with conflict and violence
detector_label_per_sub.insult: phrases and terms that convey skepticism or criticism towards mainstream narratives, especially those related to marginalized groups and societal structures
detector_label_per_sub.identity_attack: terms and phrases related to race, identity, and social justice

member_labels.1920: references to specific biological terms and acronyms
member_labels.14630: character names and terms in various languages, particularly those with diacritics

stability.selection_rule: max bootstrap-ARI among non-trivial partitions with 2<=g_community_size<=max_unit_size (ARI-stability alone collapses to one giant cluster)

selection.note: realistic toxicity outcome may be (f)~=(g)/(h)~=unit (a single dense invariant probe suffices) -> reported honestly

admission.surface_caveat: surface pairs (n=546) were BOTH generated and judged by gpt-4o-mini (judge pass 70.6%); same-model circularity is a limitation. An enlarged, independently-judged surface set arrives via the sibling dataset artifact.
admission.multiplicity: Benjamini-Hochberg over M candidate-unit min(p_C,p_K); separate from the across-targets Holm in STAGE 5/6.

metadata.auditability_note: Key latent definitions are human-auditable via Neuronpedia auto-interp labels + top-activating tokens (gemma-2-2b 12-gemmascope-res-16k). The general toxicity latent and each cluster member carry an interpretable label.

examples.input: Our oils read; President IS taking different tactics to deal with a corrupt malignant, hipoctitical , one way press! Idiots forget what witnessed them doing during the last election process.

'Work together'? Dream on. The liberals are already busy creating the next scandal/crime to accuse President Trump of since they lose the policy debate every time. They are sniveling statist traitors and they should be ground into the dirt as they will never ever let up in their qwest to destroy this country by any means available. Of that you can be sure.

Between racist Eastman and 'Slappy' Wilson the Wasilla delegation is an embarassment to the valley and the State. Both should resign. This is Trump's America, open racism in the Republican party and physical attacks on reporters. Cue the usual racist adn commenters telling us how Eastman actually has a valid point with no evidence beyond an anecdote from the time they did a stint in the bush in 3...2...1....
